steps.description: Net worth view aggregates Firefly-linked accounts (giro, savings, etc.)
steps.notes: Migration 005 net_worth_snapshots; WealthService compute_breakdown + upsert_daily_snapshot; GET /api/v1/wealth + /wealth/history; React /wealth with stat card, breakdown, mixed-currency banner, crypto placeholder; unit tests asset_filter_excludes_negative_balance, mixed_currency_when_multiple_currencies. Operator prerequisite: synced Firefly asset accounts

steps.description: Scarcity alert fires when projected balance falls below configurable threshold
steps.notes: alert_config.scarcity_threshold_eur + TOML [alerts] mirror; evaluate_scarcity 45-day horizon; sync alerts phase; Dashboard 1 $scarcity_threshold; unit tests scarcity_severity_critical_when_current_below, scarcity_fingerprint_format. Operator prerequisite: forecast with breaching balances + post-sync

steps.description: Budget drift alert fires when category spending exceeds plan by configurable %
steps.notes: alert_config.budget_drift_pct; evaluate_budget_drift MTD proration vs category-targeted plan adjustments; fingerprint budget_drift:category:{id}:{month}; REST + /alerts UI; unit tests budget_drift_proration_mid_month, budget_drift_skips_non_category. Operator prerequisite: active plan + synced MTD transactions

steps.description: Plan viability alert fires when active scenario becomes infeasible per forecast
steps.notes: evaluate_plan_viability on plan_daily_cashflow; consecutive negative month-end escalation; AlertService plan_computation_id binding; plan_viability type in schema + UI. Operator prerequisite: active plan with negative projected month-end

steps.description: Alert inbox in React UI lists active alerts with acknowledge/dismiss
steps.notes: alerts lifecycle active/acknowledged/dismissed/resolved; PATCH acknowledge + dismiss; GET /alerts + /unread-count; AlertsPage + AlertBell; unit test unread_requires_active_unacknowledged. Operator smoke: live alerts after sync

steps.description: Grafana Dashboard 4 shows total wealth (non-crypto until US-0007)
steps.notes: portfolio.json uid portfolio; panels Total wealth, Wealth over time, Account breakdown, Mixed-currency warning, Crypto placeholder US-0007; /wealth links to Dashboard 4; snapshots from WealthService::upsert_daily_snapshot. Operator smoke: post-sync snapshot for live panels

operator_prerequisites: Copy .env.example to .env with DATABASE_*, FIREFLY_*, optional AUTH_DEV_BYPASS
Provision external TimescaleDB; apply migration 005_alerts_wealth.sql at backend startup
Firefly PAT; sync asset accounts with include_net_worth=true; US-0002 forecast recompute
US-0004 active plan with category-targeted adjustments for budget drift alerts
Sync now — verify post-sync alerts phase
Open /wealth — net worth stat, breakdown, mixed-currency banner, wealth chart
Open /alerts and header bell — acknowledge/dismiss active alerts
Open Grafana Analytics dashboard portfolio (Dashboard 4); verify Dashboard 1 scarcity threshold
DATABASE_URL for wealth_alerts_integration snapshot + scarcity alert proof
